# The Daily Newzlet

> A modern, fully automated daily news aggregation platform featuring a bold, aesthetic design. It decouples RSS news ingestion from presentation to deliver curated categories.

## Main Navigation
- [Home](/) - The homepage featuring breaking news ticker, day fact, and categorized news timeline.
- [Search](/search) - Search all historical news articles.
- [Contact](/contact) - Get in touch with the editorial team.
- [Editorial Policy](/editorial) - Learn about our content curation and publishing guidelines.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy) - Our privacy policies and data protection information.
- [Terms of Service](/terms) - Terms and conditions for using the platform.

## Core News Categories
- [International News](/category/international) - Global news updates and headlines.
- [Tech Bites](/category/technology) - Latest technology, development, and computing news.
- [Sports](/category/sports) - Highlights, scores, and updates from the world of sports.
